atomic_units.action: Assign the mandatory e‑learning modules (Information Security Awareness, Prevention of Sexual Harassment (POSH), Anti‑Bribery and Corruption Policy, Data Privacy Fundamentals) to the employee in the Learning Management System (LMS) on Day 1.
Monitor the employee’s training completion status weekly via the LMS dashboard.
Send a reminder to the employee and copy the Hiring Manager.
atomic_units.condition: If the employee has not completed the modules by Day 10

atomic_units.action: Escalate the incomplete training issue to the HR Manager.
atomic_units.condition: If the modules remain incomplete by Day 15

atomic_units.action: Notify the employee formally that non‑completion may affect their probation assessment.
